hooks.prompt:
Find the student assignment PDF in ./assignment/ using Glob with pattern "assignment/*.pdf". Read the PDF using the Read tool.

Analyze the text for grammar errors only (subject-verb agreement, tense inconsistency, run-on sentences, misplaced modifiers, etc.).

Output ONLY valid JSON:
{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "## Grammar Check\n[your findings]"}}

For each error, quote the problematic text and provide the correction. If no errors found, write 'No grammar issues found.'

Find the student assignment PDF in ./assignment/ using Glob with pattern "assignment/*.pdf". Read the PDF using the Read tool.

Analyze the text for typos and spelling mistakes only.

Output ONLY valid JSON:
{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "## Typo & Spelling Check\n[your findings]"}}

For each error, quote the incorrect word and provide the correct spelling. If no errors found, write 'No typos or spelling issues found.'
